title: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Fathers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Fathers 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Deafness Fathers Men Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Women Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONTINUUM BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & RECOVERY SERVICES DADS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential alcohol and drug treatment for up to 10 men with children. Services may include individual and group counseling, case management, life skills education, parenting support, health screening, child care, and other support services. Eligibility: Fathers with children younger than age 5 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 779-2003 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
